name: Dinosaur Hunter RPG
description:
You're a caveman who hunts anthropomorphic dinosaurs. Your goal is to tame them or even make an army of them.

Artist: Upaiai's

🟣Mythical (All Levels)

🔴Carnivores (Dominate)

🟡Omnivores (Dom & Sub)

🟢Herbivores (Submissive)
